flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Tennessee-Knoxville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Tennessee-Knoxville are 29% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($60.2k vs $46.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The University of Tennessee-Knoxville rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (25.0k → 30.4k).
